top_signals.title: Pressure mounts on US defense executives to boost weapons production
top_signals.summary: Defense executives face pressure to boost production as prolonged conflicts have consumed large quantities of missiles, interceptors and other weapons.

top_signals.title: Finsbury lines up Games Workshop splurge using merger windfall
top_signals.summary: Nick Train’s Finsbury Income and Growth fund is preparing to launch a spending spree on Games Workshop shares after pocketing a windfall from a string of acquisitions in its portfolio. The FTSE 250 investment trust – which can trace its roots back over a century – unveiled plans to use both debt and returns from [...]

top_signals.title: A cocaine bust in Spain leads all the way to Wall Street
top_signals.summary: Investigations uncovered a network linking financiers with Wall Street connections, an Irish fintech trading crypto assets, luxury Dubai real estate and multiple offshore lenders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cambodian tycoon was landlord to Chinese scammers and human traffickers
top_signals.summary: A gambling empire controlled by a powerful Cambodian tycoon ⁠was the landlord of a compound that was used for industrial-scale scamming and human trafficking operations, Reuters has found.

top_signals.title: Williams Grand Prix Technologies Launches Superyacht Battery System
top_signals.summary: Williams Grand Prix Technologies has entered the marine sector with the launch of the ES10M, a battery system developed for superyachts, support and explorer vessels, hybrid propulsion applications, and refit programs. The launch marks the company's first dedicated marine product.Based in Grove…
